name: Panzer Vulpaphyla
description: Fast and foxy, Vulpaphyla are agile allies to bring along on your next adventure.

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Hotfix 29.0.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error where Panzer Vulpaphyla died before the Viral Quills projectiles landed.

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Hotfix 29.0.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error when a Panzer Vulpaphyla attempted to attack but ran out of targets.
